blocked_on: Phase 7 partial: scripted pick runs but doesn't produce a successful lift. 4 real bugs fixed. See reports/phase_7_findings.md.
notes: Phase 7 iteration surfaced: (1) cube randomization out of workspace - fixed, (2) IK action scale too small - fixed, (3) gripper action semantics inverted - fixed, (4) grasp_h needs tuning. Remaining issue: finger-table collision or mimic joint physics. User should manually teleop once to visually tune before bulk demos. Two commits on vla-pipeline-v1 branch.
